SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-28-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH K. HOEGGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MANUEL MENDOZA DBA MONTEZUMA ROOFING IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOEGGER, JOSEPH K RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA, MANUEL DBA MONTEZUMA ROOFING $2,240.00 PRINCIPAL, $154.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,394.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY NOT LATER THAN JUNE 30, 2017, CORRECT THE ROOFING AT THE KITCHEN LIGHTWELL WHICH HAS BEEN IMPROPERLY FLASHED POTENTIALLY CAUSING A LEAK INTO THE GARAGE.
